title: Replace farm gallery images with real farm photos

requirements.text: In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing 'fresh lemon tree' gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8398-1.jpeg and update its label/caption to 'Lemon Trees'.

quotes: replace the fresh lemon tree image with IMG_8398 and name them Lemon Trees
IMG_8398 → replaces the 'fresh lemon tree' image, labeled 'Lemon Trees'

acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the 'fresh lemon tree' image now displays IMG_8398-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Lemon Trees'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

requirements.text: In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing farm granary gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8399-1.jpeg (flowering mango trees at sunset) and update its label/caption to 'Flowering Mangoes'.

quotes: IMG_8399 → replaces the farm granary image, labeled 'Flowering Mangoes'

acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the farm granary image now displays IMG_8399-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Flowering Mangoes'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

requirements.text: In the FarmGallerySection, replace the existing farm entrance gallery image with the uploaded photo IMG_8402-1.jpeg (palm tree lined farm path) and update its label/caption to 'Farm Greenery'.

quotes: IMG_8402 → replaces the farm entrance image, labeled 'Farm Greenery'

acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the farm entrance image now displays IMG_8402-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Farm Greenery'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

constraints: Do not change any other gallery images or sections beyond the three specified slots
Do not modify backend logic or data models
Use the uploaded user photos as static assets; do not route them through the backend
nonGoals: Redesigning the gallery layout or lightbox behavior
Adding new gallery slots beyond the three replacements
Changing any other section of the website

edits: Crop and optimize for web gallery display (IMG_8398-1.jpeg > lemon-trees.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Crop and optimize for web gallery display (IMG_8399-1.jpeg > flowering-mangoes.dim_1200x800.jpg)
Crop and optimize for web gallery display (IMG_8402-1.jpeg > farm-greenery.dim_1200x800.jpg)
